channel.title: Deploying on Netlify
channel.description:
I'm trying to deploy the sample site on Netlify
I've added build command npx frontity build and it gets executed
Set build directory as /static
Getting this error
> Deploy did not succeed: Deploy directory 'static' does not exist
Here is the code sandbox https://codesandbox.io/s/github/laxmariappan/frontity-netlify-demo
Thanks

item.title: Deploying on Netlify
item.dc:creator: avishekpandat
item.description:
hey you have to upload it on vercel , heroku or layer0. because I also tried to upload it on netlify but unfortunately it not deployed on netlify.

Read full topic

item.title: Deploying on Netlify
item.dc:creator: laxman.2903
item.description:
I’m trying to deploy the sample site on Netlify

I’ve added build command npx frontity build and it gets executed

Set build directory as /static

Getting this error

Deploy did not succeed: Deploy directory ‘static’ does not exist

Here is the code sandbox codesandbox-frontity - CodeSandbox

Thanks

Read full topic
